message:
⚡ Fix cold-start navigation lag with Vite warmup + revert eager imports (#930)

- Revert PR #929's eager imports back to React.lazy() for all route
  components to avoid loading all pages upfront in the main bundle
- Add all 30 route components to Vite server.warmup.clientFiles so
  modules are pre-transformed at dev server startup
- Reduce prefetch delay from 20s to 500ms and increase batch size
  from 3 to 5 for faster background chunk loading
- Replace ugly dark skeleton boxes in Suspense fallback with a clean
  spinner + progressive loading status messages

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-  // In demo mode, fire immediately. Otherwise defer 20s to let
-  // the first page fully load without prefetch traffic competing.
+  // In demo mode, fire immediately. Otherwise defer 1.5s to let
+  // the first page render, then start caching all chunks so
+  // subsequent navigations are instant.
   if (isDemoMode()) {
     prefetchRoutes()
   } else {
-    setTimeout(prefetchRoutes, 20_000)
+    setTimeout(prefetchRoutes, 500)
   }
 }
